frames.purpose: 项目设置壳层与工作流入口参考；基础信息编辑不在本迭代
developmentCorrections: reuse the existing ProjectWorkspace shell; do not render a second sidebar, top bar, project header, breadcrumb, or project tab row
render the project settings title and its inner tabs only once inside the existing 设置 workspace content area
treat P13-01 as shell and entry reference only; project basic-information editing is not added by Iteration 13
use fixed stage labels: 章节规划、内容生成、审核、改写; replace 章节策划
normalize project settings inner tabs to 基本信息、工作流绑定、其他设置
preserve the current product logo, navigation terms, search, user area, widths, and spacing instead of copying the prototype shell
all user-visible product copy uses Chinese locale resources; technical type names and user-configured environment names may remain unchanged
binding means only a saved relationship and must not be presented as validated, executable, or successfully integrated
enabled=false workflows are visible but not selectable; integration and connection states are informational warnings and do not silently remove an existing binding
drawers use a sticky header and footer, internal scrolling, focus trap, Escape close, and duplicate-submit protection
long workflow and connection names use ellipsis with an accessible full-name tooltip
P13-09 issue counts and status descriptions are derived from real data; healthy bindings keep the 更换工作流 action available
P13-10 preserves the user's selection on 409 and reloads the latest server state without silently overwriting it
